requests.problem: I want to know how much of my paycheck is left after fixed costs like rent and subscriptions, but doing the math every time is a hassle.
requests.desiredFeatures: A tool where I enter my income and recurring costs once, and it shows my real 'free to spend' amount for the month.

requests.problem: I keep forgetting which subscriptions I'm paying for until I see the charge on my card.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to list all my subscriptions with their renewal dates and get a reminder a few days before each one renews.

requests.problem: I want to save up for a trip, but I never actually stick to a savings goal.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple goal tracker where I set a target amount and date, and it tells me how much to set aside each week to get there.

requests.problem: Splitting bills with roommates always turns into a confusing group chat full of who-owes-who.
requests.desiredFeatures: A shared list where we log shared expenses and it automatically calculates who owes what to whom.

requests.problem: I don't really know where my money goes each month, I just know it's gone.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple way to log purchases by category and see a breakdown at the end of the month.

requests.problem: I want to compare prices before buying something big, but I forget what I found on different sites.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to paste in links and prices I'm comparing, so I can see them side by side before deciding.

requests.problem: I have a vague savings goal for a new laptop but no plan, so I never actually save.
requests.desiredFeatures: A visual progress bar for a savings goal, plus a quick way to log how much I saved today.

requests.problem: I have tasks scattered across notes apps, texts, and my memory, so things fall through the cracks.
requests.desiredFeatures: One simple list where I can dump anything I need to do and check it off, without folders getting in the way.

requests.problem: I procrastinate on big assignments because they feel overwhelming as one giant task.
requests.desiredFeatures: A way to break a big task into smaller steps and see my progress as I check each one off.

requests.problem: I lose track of which day I'm supposed to do recurring chores like laundry or watering plants.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple recurring reminder list for chores that repeat weekly or monthly.

requests.problem: I get distracted mid-task and forget what I was originally trying to do.
requests.desiredFeatures: A tiny 'what am I doing right now' note that stays visible while I work, that I can update in one tap.

requests.problem: I set goals at the start of the week but never check back in on them.
requests.desiredFeatures: A weekly check-in screen that shows my goals from Monday and asks me to mark them done or carried over.

requests.problem: I want to time-box my study or work sessions but keep losing track of how long I've actually focused.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple focus timer that logs how long each session was, so I can see my total focused time for the day.

requests.problem: I have too many browser tabs open with things I meant to read or do later.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to save a link with a one-line note about why I saved it, so my browser tabs can stay closed.

requests.problem: I'm trying to learn a new skill from scattered YouTube videos and forget what I've already watched.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple checklist of videos or resources in order, so I know exactly where I left off.

requests.problem: I make flashcards but never review them on a schedule, so I forget what I learned.
requests.desiredFeatures: A basic flashcard tool that reminds me to review cards a few days after I first learn them.

requests.problem: I want to track how many hours I've studied for an exam, but I keep losing count.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple timer and log where I record each study session and see a running total for the week.

requests.problem: I read a lot of articles for a course but forget the key points a week later.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to save a short summary for each thing I read, searchable by topic later.

requests.problem: I'm learning a language but don't have a way to track which words I already know.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple list where I mark words as 'learning' or 'known' and can quiz myself on the 'learning' ones.

requests.problem: I want to build a daily study habit but keep breaking my streak without noticing.
requests.desiredFeatures: A streak counter for a daily habit, with a friendly nudge if I haven't logged today yet.

requests.problem: I want to build a habit of drinking more water but keep forgetting during the day.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple counter I can tap each time I drink a glass of water, with a friendly daily reset.

requests.problem: I do home workouts but never remember which exercises I did last time to switch things up.
requests.desiredFeatures: A log where I pick from a list of exercises I did that day, so I can see my history and avoid repeating the same routine.

requests.problem: I want to build a consistent sleep schedule but have no idea how irregular it actually is.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to log my bedtime and wake time each day and see a simple weekly pattern.

requests.problem: I try to stretch every day but forget which stretches target which muscles.
requests.desiredFeatures: A short list of stretches with a simple timer for each one, so I can follow along without thinking.

requests.problem: I want to track my steps or workouts across different apps but everything is scattered.
requests.desiredFeatures: One simple place to log any activity type and duration, without needing a fitness tracker device.

requests.problem: I set fitness goals but never check whether I'm actually making progress.
requests.desiredFeatures: A monthly summary that shows how many workouts I logged compared to my goal.

requests.problem: I want to notice patterns in my mood but never write anything down in the moment.
requests.desiredFeatures: A one-tap mood log with an optional short note, so I can look back and spot patterns later.

requests.problem: I know gratitude journaling helps me, but I forget to do it most days.
requests.desiredFeatures: A tiny daily prompt asking for one thing I'm grateful for, quick enough to answer in ten seconds.

requests.problem: I get overwhelmed and don't know what's actually stressing me out.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple list where I dump whatever is on my mind, so I can see it laid out instead of swirling in my head.

requests.problem: I want to build a short daily reflection habit but journaling apps feel like too much.
requests.desiredFeatures: Three short prompts a day I can answer in one line each, with a streak to keep me consistent.

requests.problem: I forget to check in with myself during busy weeks and burn out without noticing.
requests.desiredFeatures: A quick weekly energy check where I rate how I'm doing out of 5, with a graph over time.

requests.problem: I always forget people's birthdays until it's too late to get a good gift.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple birthday list with reminders a couple weeks ahead, so I have time to plan a gift.

requests.problem: I hear friends mention things they want but forget by the time their birthday comes around.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to jot down gift ideas for specific people as they come up, so I have a list ready when I need it.

requests.problem: I want to stay in touch with friends who live far away but always lose track of who I last talked to.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple list of friends with the date I last reached out, so I know who's overdue for a message.

requests.problem: Planning a group hangout always turns into a messy back-and-forth about times that work.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple poll where everyone marks the times they're free, and it highlights the best overlap.

requests.problem: I want to remember small details friends tell me about their lives so I can ask about them later.
requests.desiredFeatures: A private note per person where I can jot down little details to remember for next time.

requests.problem: I have a backlog of books I want to read but forget what's actually on the list.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple to-read list I can check off, with a spot to jot a one-line reaction after finishing.

requests.problem: I start creative projects but abandon them because I lose track of my next step.
requests.desiredFeatures: A project board where each project has a simple 'next step' note, so I always know where to pick back up.

requests.problem: I want to track which movies or shows I've watched and rate them, but keep forgetting titles.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple watched-list with a star rating and optional note for each title.

requests.problem: I collect playlists across different moods but can never find the right one later.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple tagging system for playlists by mood or activity, so I can find the right one fast.

requests.problem: I want to build a habit of drawing or writing daily but keep skipping days.
requests.desiredFeatures: A daily streak tracker for a creative habit, with a place to log a quick note of what I made.

requests.problem: I forget which household items are running low until I'm already out.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple shared shopping list where anyone in the house can add an item when they notice it's low.

requests.problem: I want to declutter my room but don't know where to start or track progress.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple checklist broken down by area (closet, desk, etc.) that I can tackle one at a time.

requests.problem: Plants at home keep dying because I forget to water them on schedule.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple per-plant watering reminder based on how often each one actually needs it.

requests.problem: I can never remember which household task I did last, like when I last cleaned the fridge.
requests.desiredFeatures: A log of chores with the last-done date, so I can see what's overdue at a glance.

requests.problem: Splitting chores with roommates always feels unfair because no one remembers who did what.
requests.desiredFeatures: A shared rotating chore list that shows whose turn it is for each task this week.

requests.problem: I'm applying to multiple jobs and lose track of which ones I've followed up on.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple tracker for each application with its status and the date I last followed up.

requests.problem: I want to prep for interviews but forget which questions I struggled with last time.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to log interview questions I got asked, with notes on how I'd answer better next time.

requests.problem: I keep meaning to update my resume with new skills but never actually do it.
requests.desiredFeatures: A running list of accomplishments and skills I can add to anytime, so updating my resume later is easy.

requests.problem: I want to track which recruiters or contacts I've networked with, but it's all scattered in my messages.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple contact list with a note on how we met and when I last followed up.

requests.problem: I stand in front of the fridge every night with no idea what to cook.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple list of meals I know how to make, so I can just pick one instead of deciding from scratch.

requests.problem: I buy ingredients for recipes and then forget to use them before they go bad.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple pantry list with expiry reminders, so nothing gets forgotten in the back of the fridge.

requests.problem: I want to meal prep for the week but keep underestimating how much time it'll take.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple weekly meal plan template where I assign meals to days ahead of time.

requests.problem: I find good recipes online but lose the link and can never find them again.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to save recipe links with a photo and short note, organized however I like.

requests.problem: I want to try cooking more variety but keep making the same three meals.
requests.desiredFeatures: A random meal picker from a list I build myself, so I stop defaulting to the same dishes.

requests.problem: I order takeout more than I mean to and don't realize how often until the bill arrives.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple log each time I order takeout, so I can see the pattern over a month.

requests.problem: Planning a trip means juggling bookings, ideas, and packing lists across a dozen browser tabs.
requests.desiredFeatures: One place per trip to keep bookings, ideas, and a packing checklist together.

requests.problem: I forget to pack something every single trip.
requests.desiredFeatures: A reusable packing checklist template I can customize per trip type (beach, hiking, city).

requests.problem: I want to budget for a trip but always end up spending more than planned.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple trip budget where I set category limits and log expenses as I go.

requests.problem: I collect travel recommendations from friends but forget them by the time I actually plan a trip.
requests.desiredFeatures: A place to save travel tips by destination, so they're ready when I actually book something.

requests.problem: My phone has so many apps I forget which ones I actually use.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple monthly check-in list to review and mark apps as keep or delete.

requests.problem: I have account info scattered across notes and my memory and can never remember what exists.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple, private way to jot down which accounts I have so I remember what exists.

requests.problem: I keep meaning to back up my photos but never actually get around to it.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple monthly reminder checklist to back up photos, with a way to mark it done.

requests.problem: I sign up for free trials and forget to cancel before they charge me.
requests.desiredFeatures: A tracker for free trials with the exact cancel-by date and a reminder before it hits.

requests.problem: My phone storage keeps filling up and I don't know what's taking up space.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple checklist of common space-hogging categories to review each month, like downloads and duplicate photos.

requests.problem: I want to buy something but keep going back and forth between a few options.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple side-by-side comparison list for the pros, cons, and price of each option I'm considering.

requests.problem: I impulse buy things online and regret it later.
requests.desiredFeatures: A 24-hour holding list where I add things I want to buy and only actually purchase if I still want it the next day.

requests.problem: I forget which stores or brands had the best price on something I buy regularly.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple note per item I buy often, tracking where I found the best price last time.

requests.problem: I want to track big purchases I'm saving up for, ranked by priority.
requests.desiredFeatures: A wishlist where I can rank items by priority and see estimated cost together.

requests.problem: I play several games and lose track of my progress or what to do next in each.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple per-game notes list for current objectives, so I remember where I left off.

requests.problem: I want to track games I've finished and rate them, but forget to log it after finishing.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple backlog and finished-games list with a quick rating and note.

requests.problem: My watchlist for shows and movies is scattered across different apps and screenshots.
requests.desiredFeatures: One unified watchlist where I can add anything from any source, with a status of 'want to watch' or 'watched'.

requests.problem: I want to reduce how much I throw away but have no sense of my actual habits.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple weekly log of what I threw away vs. recycled, to notice patterns over time.

requests.problem: I want to buy more secondhand items but forget to check secondhand options before buying new.
requests.desiredFeatures: A reminder checklist step before any purchase over a certain amount: did I check secondhand first?

requests.problem: I want to track small eco-friendly habits like using a reusable bottle, but forget if I've been consistent.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple daily checklist of a few small habits I'm trying to build, with a streak counter.

requests.problem: I forget when my pet's next vet appointment or vaccination is due.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple reminder list for pet care dates like vet visits, grooming, and medication.

requests.problem: I want to track my pet's feeding schedule when multiple people in the house feed them.
requests.desiredFeatures: A shared checklist that shows whether the pet has been fed today, so we don't double or forget feeding.

requests.problem: I want to log my pet's weight and health notes over time but keep forgetting to write it down.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple timeline where I can add a quick note or weight entry for my pet whenever I think of it.

requests.problem: I never remember which bus or train combination is fastest for different times of day.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple note-to-self list of my best routes for different times, so I don't have to re-figure it out each time.

requests.problem: I want to track how much I'm spending on transit each month but never add it up.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple log where I tap to record a fare each time, with a running monthly total.

requests.problem: I carpool with coworkers and the schedule of who drives when gets confusing.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple shared weekly schedule showing whose turn it is to drive.

requests.problem: I do freelance work on the side and lose track of which clients still owe me payment.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple list of jobs with client name, amount, and payment status.

requests.problem: I want to track hours for a side project to see if it's actually worth my time hourly.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple timer and log per project, showing total hours and effective hourly rate.

requests.problem: I have small business ideas but they get lost in random notes and forgotten.
requests.desiredFeatures: A single running list of ideas I can quickly add to, with a spot to jot follow-up thoughts later.

requests.problem: Planning a group event means constant back-and-forth messages about who's bringing what.
requests.desiredFeatures: A shared sign-up list where people can claim what they're bringing, visible to everyone.

requests.problem: I RSVP to things and then forget to actually add them to my calendar.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple list of upcoming events with the date, so nothing slips through after I say yes.

requests.problem: I want to track recurring events like monthly meetups but keep missing them.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple recurring reminder for events that happen on an irregular but repeating basis.

requests.problem: I hear a song I like but forget to save it before I lose the moment.
requests.desiredFeatures: A quick one-tap way to jot down a song title or artist to look up later.

requests.problem: I want to build a workout or focus playlist but keep starting over from scratch.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple running list of songs tagged by mood, so I can pull from it when building a new playlist.

requests.problem: I highlight passages in books but never revisit them afterward.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple place to type in a quote or passage I liked, tagged by the book it came from.

requests.problem: I want to track my reading pace to hit a yearly reading goal.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple log of pages or books read by date, with a progress bar toward a yearly goal.

requests.problem: I want to build better habits in general but forget which ones I'm even trying to build.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple list of habits I'm working on, each with a daily check-in and streak counter.

requests.problem: I make plans with friends and forget the details like time and place by the time it rolls around.
requests.desiredFeatures: A shared plan card with the who/what/when/where, that both people can see.

requests.problem: I want to track small wins throughout the day but forget them by evening.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple running list I can add to anytime, that shows a summary of my wins at the end of each day.

requests.problem: I want to compare a few apartment or room listings but keep losing track of details between tabs.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple comparison list for listings with price, location, and notes side by side.

requests.problem: I set New Year's or monthly resolutions but never look at them again after the first week.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple resolutions list with a monthly check-in reminder to revisit and update progress.

requests.problem: I want to track which chores or errands I've delegated to others so nothing gets forgotten.
requests.desiredFeatures: A shared task list where I can assign an errand to a specific person and mark it done.

requests.problem: I keep meaning to try new restaurants or cafes recommended to me but forget the names.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple list of place recommendations with who suggested them, so I can pick one when deciding where to go.

requests.problem: I want to track my screen time goals but forget to check whether I'm sticking to them.
requests.desiredFeatures: A simple daily log where I note my screen time and compare it against a goal I set.

requests.problem: I want a single place to jot quick ideas throughout the day without them getting lost in other apps.
requests.desiredFeatures: A minimal quick-capture note list, nothing fancy, just fast enough that I actually use it.
